# MyLibrary Events

> Free search for kids' storytimes and events (storytime, crafts, STEM, music & movement, book clubs) at US public libraries. Enter a ZIP code or city and see live, upcoming events at the public libraries near you, filterable by age group, event type, date, and distance.

All events are free. No account or login is required.

## Key pages
- [Home / search](https://mylibrary-events.com/): search by ZIP or city for nearby library kids' events.
- [Browse by state](https://mylibrary-events.com/storytimes): index of every US state with active library event coverage, drilling down to city and individual library pages.
- [Sitemap](https://mylibrary-events.com/sitemap.xml): all city and library landing pages.
- [Privacy](https://mylibrary-events.com/privacy)

## About the data
Aggregates the public event calendars of hundreds of US public library systems (via BiblioCommons, LibCal, Communico, LibraryCalendar/iCal, and several custom municipal platforms) into one search. Library locations come from the IMLS Public Libraries Survey; event data is fetched live from each library's own public calendar. Coverage is US public libraries only and is continually expanding. Events belong to their libraries — always confirm details on the library's own website.
